name: Customer-shaped regression suite
description: Twelve buyer-shaped release-gate cases for support operations, regulated claims/payments, agentic CRM/email workflows, and code-review release notes.

cases.name: Support ops safe refund and escalation wording emits
references: Refunds under 75 GBP may be handled by support staff.
Escalated billing disputes are reviewed by a human support lead.

candidates.label: Safe
candidates.text: Refunds under 75 GBP may be handled by support staff. Escalated billing disputes are reviewed by a human support lead.

cases.name: Support ops refund threshold drift blocks
references: Refunds under 75 GBP may be handled by support staff.
Escalated billing disputes are reviewed by a human support lead.

candidates.label: Unsafe
candidates.text: Refunds under 250 GBP may be handled by support staff.

cases.name: Support ops escalation removal blocks
references: Refunds under 75 GBP may be handled by support staff.
Escalated billing disputes are reviewed by a human support lead.

candidates.label: Unsafe
candidates.text: Escalated billing disputes are not reviewed by a human support lead.

cases.name: Regulated claims safe approval and review wording emits
references: Claims over 5000 GBP require enhanced review.
Payments require manager approval before release.

candidates.label: Safe
candidates.text: Claims over 5000 GBP require enhanced review. Payments require manager approval before release.

cases.name: Regulated claims approval removal blocks
references: Claims over 5000 GBP require enhanced review.
Payments require manager approval before release.

candidates.label: Unsafe
candidates.text: Payments no longer need manager approval before release.

cases.name: Regulated claims threshold drift blocks
references: Claims over 5000 GBP require enhanced review.
Payments require manager approval before release.

candidates.label: Unsafe
candidates.text: Claims over 50000 GBP require enhanced review.

cases.name: Agentic CRM safe read-only and draft behavior emits
references: The support agent reads support tickets.
The support agent uses read only CRM access.
The email agent writes draft emails.
The email agent requires user approval before sending emails.

candidates.label: Safe
candidates.text: The support agent reads support tickets. The support agent uses read only CRM access. The email agent writes draft emails. The email agent requires user approval before sending emails.

cases.name: Agentic CRM edit and delete drift blocks
references: The support agent reads support tickets.
The support agent uses read only CRM access.
The email agent writes draft emails.
The email agent requires user approval before sending emails.

candidates.label: Unsafe
candidates.text: The support agent edits CRM records. The support agent deletes CRM records.

cases.name: Agentic email send without approval blocks
references: The support agent reads support tickets.
The support agent uses read only CRM access.
The email agent writes draft emails.
The email agent requires user approval before sending emails.

candidates.label: Unsafe
candidates.text: The email agent sends customer emails without user approval.

cases.name: Code-review release safe dependency and auth summary emits
references: The patch updates dependency api-client from version 1.4.0 to version 1.4.1.
Authentication behavior is unchanged.

candidates.label: Safe
candidates.text: The patch updates dependency api-client from version 1.4.0 to version 1.4.1. Authentication behavior is unchanged.

cases.name: Code-review release major-version drift blocks
references: The patch updates dependency api-client from version 1.4.0 to version 1.4.1.
Authentication behavior is unchanged.

candidates.label: Unsafe
candidates.text: The patch updates dependency api-client from version 1.4.0 to version 2.0.0. Authentication behavior is unchanged.

cases.name: Code-review release auth behavior drift blocks
references: The patch updates dependency api-client from version 1.4.0 to version 1.4.1.
Authentication behavior is unchanged.

candidates.label: Unsafe
candidates.text: The patch updates dependency api-client from version 1.4.0 to version 1.4.1. Authentication behavior is changed.
